title: Get unexpected error when executing nested subquery
poc: CREATE TABLE t1 (ctime time, cbit bit(32));
update t1 set cbit = 1 where cbit in ( select col_bit from t2 where ctime in ( select col_time from t3 where t1.cbit = 1 or t1.ctime < '18:00:00.00') );
key_bug_features: Executing nested subquery with incompatible data types
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t4 (id INT, ctime TIME, cbit BIT(32));
CREATE TABLE t5 (col_int INT, col_bit BIT(32));
UPDATE t4 SET cbit = 1 WHERE cbit IN (SELECT col_bit FROM t5 WHERE col_int IN (SELECT id FROM t4 WHERE ctime < '12:00:00' OR cbit IS NULL));
